description: Perform a customer frequency analysis in Oracle Analytics Desktop using the 'sample_order_lines.xlsx' dataset located on the Desktop. Create a calculated column named 'Orders Per Customer' that counts distinct Order IDs for each Customer Name. Visualize the distribution of customers by their order frequency using a bar chart, ensuring 'Orders Per Customer' is treated as an attribute for the visualization. Save the workbook as 'Customer_Frequency_Dist'.
